name: MODEL D
subtitle: Analog Synthesizer Voice (Moog Model D Clone)
summary: A faithful reproduction of the classic Moog Model D (Minimoog) architecture in Eurorack format. Three analog VCOs with five waveforms, a 24 dB/oct ladder filter with resonance, overdrive, a triangle/square LFO, dual ADSR envelopes, external audio input, and 16-voice MIDI poly chain. Eurorack-compatible with full patch point access.
